watchouts: Low volume; check credential ownership and error notifications.
Execution data retention may be enough at 7 days only for short debugging windows.
Monthly volume exceeds Starter baseline; confirm concurrency during outages.
Almost consumes the Starter baseline by itself; add buffer before launch.
Burst concurrency and retry behavior matter more than average daily count.
Each message can become one production execution; also watch AI provider cost.

cloud_fit: Cloud only if files are small
watchouts: Binary data and memory can become the real limit before execution count.
Manual executions do not count toward quota, but large manual runs can still consume memory.
